markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Mindr and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, production, and workflow for DUI.org and related websites.](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production set at 10 new pieces/week, with 5 content refreshes starting week 2-3](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Airtable setup as content OS for tracking, approvals, and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Legal review process needs streamlining; checklist of review flags to be developed](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Website launch delayed until late October; content creation focused on building library](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [State-based content temporarily paused; focus on keyword-based blog content](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

## Topics

### Content Management System and Workflow

  - [Airtable set up as central content OS for tracking, assignments, and approvals](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Includes sections for personas, topic clusters, product categories, and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Process for feedback: comments in Airtable, revisions based on severity of changes](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [WordPress CMS access provided, but site not live yet for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)

### Content Strategy and Production

  - [10 new articles/week: 5 programmatic (state-level) + 5 generic DUI topics](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [State-based content temporarily paused due to lack of rules engine](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Focus shifted to keyword-based blog content and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Three-pronged keyword strategy: land and expand, ad keyword long-tail, competitor gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

### Legal Review and Compliance

  - [Need to develop streamlined process with legal team for content approval](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Proposal to create a checklist of review flags to expedite the process](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)

### Graphics and Visual Content

  - [Current process: submit ticket to Stephanie for graphics](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Considering creation of pre-approved graphics library for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Team to handle image sourcing; no need for external support on this](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Implementing 5 content refreshes per week starting week 2-3](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Using SEO testing tool to identify and prioritize content for refresh](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Focus on articles with biggest drop in clicks over last 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

### Multi-Brand Content Strategy

  - [Plans to create separate content for other brands (Intoxalock, Breathe Easy)](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Proposal to alternate focus between brands on a bi-weekly basis](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Separate Airtables to be set up for each domain](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop checklist with legal team for content review flags](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Set up separate Airtables for Intoxalock and Breathe Easy content](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Create list of content for refresh based on Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Begin content refresh process alongside new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Await further direction from Jessica (SEO lead) on keyword plan](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Continue content production for DUI.org, building library for late October launch](https://fathom.video/share/s59EMHY1wUHZe-orMo-fw4hYggsRtkxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
